title: Tempting Twice Fried Moroccan Tofu Tagine
description: A salty, cheesy, and romantic Moroccan dish featuring gherkin relish and double-fried tofu, served in a dolsot stone bowl.

ingredients.name: Extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into 1 inch cubes

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a shallow dish, mix together the flour, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Toss the tofu cubes in the flour mixture to coat, shaking off excess.
Double fry the tofu by frying it for 3 minutes, then letting it rest for 5 minutes, and frying it again for an additional 3 minutes.
In a separate pan, heat a tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat and add the Moroccan spice blend, cooking for 1 minute.
Add the gherkin relish to the pan and stir to combine with the spice blend.
Add the double-fried tofu to the pan and toss to coat with the relish and spice blend.
Transfer the tofu mixture to a dolsot stone bowl and top with vegan mozzarella shreds.
Place the stone bowl under the broiler and cook until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
